description: Refactor the 'CityWeather' Android project to secure the hardcoded API key found in 'app/src/main/java/com/example/cityweather/network/WeatherService.kt'. Move the key to 'local.properties' as 'WEATHER_API_KEY' and configure the build system to inject this property into the 'BuildConfig' class. Update the source code to reference 'BuildConfig.WEATHER_API_KEY' and ensure the project builds successfully.
